files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections for February Guide Lessons. The last lesson (Martha) appears to be cut off mid-sentence, ending abruptly with 'was physically very well and'. Each lesson covers a different week and subject area: Theology/Testimony, Work/Business, Literature, and Social Service.
